title: crataegus × media var. intermixta
intro: Crataegus × media var. intermixta, also known as the hawthorn hybrid, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a vasodilator, lowering blood pressure, and improving cardiovascular health due to its high content of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins. The health benefits of Crataegus × media var. intermixta include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving circulation, and lowering cholesterol levels. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
